body: grendel:8000 unreachable (AC4 primary blocker); task subset files contain placeholder task IDs; sweep requires 8-12+ hours of dedicated execution that cannot be completed within a single automated agent session # Bead: fizeau-c770193a — Run full TerminalBench 2.1 sweep # Attempted: 2026-05-07 # Execution: 20260507T052732-078be82b ## AC1 — Dependency bead status fizeau-ee77ec7f (TB-2.1 migration): CLOSED ✅ fizeau-85d36567 (runner implementation): CLOSED ✅ ## AC2 — Resource contention preflight No unrelated benchmark, Harbor, vidar, oMLX, bragi, club-3090, OpenRouter, Claude, or Codex jobs were detected on this machine at execution time. Clear for launch once other blockers are resolved. ## Infrastructure preflight (2026-05-07T05:32Z) | Endpoint              | Port  | Status       | |-----------------------|-------|--------------| | vidar oMLX            | 1235  | REACHABLE    | | bragi LM Studio       | 1234  | REACHABLE    | | bragi club-3090 vLLM  | 8020  | REACHABLE    | | sindri club-3090 vLLM | 8020  | REACHABLE    | | grendel Rapid-MLX     | 8000  | UNREACHABLE  | OPENROUTER_API_KEY: SET Harbor version: 0.3.0 fiz-bench: buildable (go build -buildvcs=false -o /tmp/fiz-bench ./cmd/bench) TB-2.1 dataset: present at /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench/ (89 tasks) ## Primary blocker: grendel:8000 unreachable (AC4) AC4 requires the local-qwen phase to run "verified local qwen3.6-27b providers × supported harness/fiz lanes," and the bead notes specify: "local-qwen phase should use vidar-qwen3-6-27b native oMLX, grendel-rapid-mlx, bragi-club-3090, and sindri-club-3090." The sweep plan lane fiz-grendel-rapid-mlx-qwen3-6-27b uses http://grendel:8000/v1. Until grendel is restored, AC4 cannot be satisfied as written. If grendel is confirmed permanently offline, the bead notes should be amended to exclude grendel-rapid-mlx and AC4 should be updated accordingly before re-running. ## Secondary blocker: task subset placeholder IDs Both task-subset-tb21-canary.yaml and task-subset-tb21-full.yaml contain placeholder task IDs (fix-concurrent-cache, parse-csv-to-sql, configure-env-paths, etc.) that do not match any task in the actual TB-2.1 dataset at /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/ terminal-bench/. The fiz-bench matrix --tasks-dir lookup will fail for every cell. These files must be updated with real task IDs before launching any graded run. ### Correct canary task IDs (covering SE, data-processing, system-administration) Replace task-subset-tb21-canary.yaml tasks with: - id: fix-git              # SE, easy, cpus=1; pre-release canary verified: ~94-642s - id: log-summary-date-ranges  # data-processing, medium, cpus=1 - id: git-multibranch      # system-administration, medium, cpus=1 ### Correct full subset task IDs (quotas: SE=5, security=3, file-ops=2, sysadmin=2, data-processing=2, debugging=1) Filter: cpus==1; sort: difficulty desc then id asc within category. SE (5): cancel-async-tasks (hard), circuit-fibsqrt (hard), fix-ocaml-gc (hard), gpt2-codegolf (hard), make-doom-for-mips (hard) + fix-git (easy) — canary task; include as canary overlap Security (3): fix-code-vulnerability (hard), password-recovery (hard), break-filter-js-from-html (medium) File-ops (2): extract-moves-from-video (hard), db-wal-recovery (medium) Sysadmin (2): configure-git-webserver (hard), git-multibranch (medium) + git-multibranch is canary overlap; configure-git-webserver fills the second slot Data-processing (2): financial-document-processor (medium), log-summary-date-ranges (medium) + log-summary-date-ranges is canary overlap Debugging (1): build-cython-ext (medium) Total: 15 tasks (including 3 canary tasks as overlapping members). ## Tertiary blocker: multi-hour execution time Sweep duration estimates (from pre-release canary timings in sweep plan): - Canary (3 tasks × 11 lanes × 3 reps): ~35-60 min for local lanes alone - Local-qwen phase (15 tasks × 5 lanes × 3 reps, sequential per resource group): vidar-omlx:       15 × 3 × 231s  ≈ 3.5h bragi-club-3090:  15 × 3 ×  94s  ≈ 1.2h sindri-club-3090: 15 × 3 × 124s  ≈ 1.5h bragi-lmstudio:   15 × 3 × ~200s ≈ 2.5h  (if preflight passes) - sonnet-comparison + gpt-comparison: additional 1-2h at OpenRouter Total estimated wall time: 9-12 hours. This cannot be completed in a single automated agent session and requires a dedicated benchmark window per the bead description and triage:manual label. ## Commands to run when prerequisites are met Prerequisite: fix task subset files (see above), restore grendel OR amend AC4. ### Phase 1 — Canary (run first; gate subsequent phases) cd <repo-root> go build -buildvcs=false -o fiz-bench ./cmd/bench ./scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh \ --phase canary \ --tasks-dir /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench \ --per-run-budget-usd 5.0 \ --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21 # After canary completes, aggregate: fiz-bench matrix-aggregate \ --in benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21/canary \ --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21/canary/matrix.json ### Phase 2 — local-qwen ./scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh \ --phase local-qwen \ --tasks-dir /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench \ --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21 \ --resume ### Phase 3 — sonnet-comparison ./scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh \ --phase sonnet-comparison \ --tasks-dir /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench \ --per-run-budget-usd 5.0 \ --matrix-jobs-managed 5 \ --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21 \ --resume ### Phase 4 — gpt-comparison ./scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh \ --phase gpt-comparison \ --tasks-dir /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench \ --per-run-budget-usd 5.0 \ --matrix-jobs-managed 5 \ --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21 \ --resume ### Post-sweep: commit evidence After all four phases complete, the memo and matrix artifacts should be committed: docs/research/terminalbench-2-1-sweep-results-<date>.md  (per AC9) benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21/ (matrix.json, costs.json per phase) The commit message should follow the format: bench: commit TB-2.1 full sweep results [fizeau-c770193a] ## What a follow-up bead / manual operator needs to do 1. Restore grendel:8000 OR amend AC4 to reflect grendel exclusion. 2. Update task-subset-tb21-canary.yaml and task-subset-tb21-full.yaml with the real task IDs listed above. 3. Run the four phases in sequence in a dedicated benchmark window. 4. Aggregate each phase with fiz-bench matrix-aggregate. 5. Write docs/research/terminalbench-2-1-sweep-results-YYYYMMDD.md with commands, environment, dataset commit, phase/lane definitions, resource group concurrency settings, pass/fail/invalid counts, costs, and artifact paths. 6. Commit and close the bead.

# Bead: fizeau-c770193a — Run full TerminalBench 2.1 sweep
# Attempted: 2026-05-07
# Execution: 20260507T052732-078be82b

## AC1 — Dependency bead status

fizeau-ee77ec7f (TB-2.1 migration): CLOSED ✅
fizeau-85d36567 (runner implementation): CLOSED ✅

## AC2 — Resource contention preflight

No unrelated benchmark, Harbor, vidar, oMLX, bragi, club-3090, OpenRouter, Claude,
or Codex jobs were detected on this machine at execution time. Clear for launch once
other blockers are resolved.

## Infrastructure preflight (2026-05-07T05:32Z)

| Endpoint              | Port  | Status       |
|-----------------------|-------|--------------|
| vidar oMLX            | 1235  | REACHABLE    |
| bragi LM Studio       | 1234  | REACHABLE    |
| bragi club-3090 vLLM  | 8020  | REACHABLE    |
| sindri club-3090 vLLM | 8020  | REACHABLE    |
| grendel Rapid-MLX     | 8000  | UNREACHABLE  |

OPENROUTER_API_KEY: SET
Harbor version: 0.3.0
fiz-bench: buildable (go build -buildvcs=false -o /tmp/fiz-bench ./cmd/bench)
TB-2.1 dataset: present at /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench/ (89 tasks)

## Primary blocker: grendel:8000 unreachable (AC4)

AC4 requires the local-qwen phase to run "verified local qwen3.6-27b providers ×
supported harness/fiz lanes," and the bead notes specify:
  "local-qwen phase should use vidar-qwen3-6-27b native oMLX, grendel-rapid-mlx,
   bragi-club-3090, and sindri-club-3090."

The sweep plan lane fiz-grendel-rapid-mlx-qwen3-6-27b uses http://grendel:8000/v1.
Until grendel is restored, AC4 cannot be satisfied as written.

If grendel is confirmed permanently offline, the bead notes should be amended to
exclude grendel-rapid-mlx and AC4 should be updated accordingly before re-running.

## Secondary blocker: task subset placeholder IDs

Both task-subset-tb21-canary.yaml and task-subset-tb21-full.yaml contain placeholder
task IDs (fix-concurrent-cache, parse-csv-to-sql, configure-env-paths, etc.) that
do not match any task in the actual TB-2.1 dataset at /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/
terminal-bench/. The fiz-bench matrix --tasks-dir lookup will fail for every cell.

These files must be updated with real task IDs before launching any graded run.

### Correct canary task IDs (covering SE, data-processing, system-administration)

Replace task-subset-tb21-canary.yaml tasks with:
  - id: fix-git              # SE, easy, cpus=1; pre-release canary verified: ~94-642s
  - id: log-summary-date-ranges  # data-processing, medium, cpus=1
  - id: git-multibranch      # system-administration, medium, cpus=1

### Correct full subset task IDs (quotas: SE=5, security=3, file-ops=2, sysadmin=2, data-processing=2, debugging=1)
Filter: cpus==1; sort: difficulty desc then id asc within category.

SE (5): cancel-async-tasks (hard), circuit-fibsqrt (hard), fix-ocaml-gc (hard),
        gpt2-codegolf (hard), make-doom-for-mips (hard)
  + fix-git (easy) — canary task; include as canary overlap

Security (3): fix-code-vulnerability (hard), password-recovery (hard),
              break-filter-js-from-html (medium)

File-ops (2): extract-moves-from-video (hard), db-wal-recovery (medium)

Sysadmin (2): configure-git-webserver (hard), git-multibranch (medium)
  + git-multibranch is canary overlap; configure-git-webserver fills the second slot

Data-processing (2): financial-document-processor (medium), log-summary-date-ranges (medium)
  + log-summary-date-ranges is canary overlap

Debugging (1): build-cython-ext (medium)

Total: 15 tasks (including 3 canary tasks as overlapping members).

## Tertiary blocker: multi-hour execution time

Sweep duration estimates (from pre-release canary timings in sweep plan):
  - Canary (3 tasks × 11 lanes × 3 reps): ~35-60 min for local lanes alone
  - Local-qwen phase (15 tasks × 5 lanes × 3 reps, sequential per resource group):
      vidar-omlx:       15 × 3 × 231s  ≈ 3.5h
      bragi-club-3090:  15 × 3 ×  94s  ≈ 1.2h
      sindri-club-3090: 15 × 3 × 124s  ≈ 1.5h
      bragi-lmstudio:   15 × 3 × ~200s ≈ 2.5h  (if preflight passes)
  - sonnet-comparison + gpt-comparison: additional 1-2h at OpenRouter

  Total estimated wall time: 9-12 hours.

This cannot be completed in a single automated agent session and requires a dedicated
benchmark window per the bead description and triage:manual label.

## Commands to run when prerequisites are met

Prerequisite: fix task subset files (see above), restore grendel OR amend AC4.

### Phase 1 — Canary (run first; gate subsequent phases)

  cd <repo-root>
  go build -buildvcs=false -o fiz-bench ./cmd/bench

  ./scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh \
    --phase canary \
    --tasks-dir /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench \
    --per-run-budget-usd 5.0 \
    --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21

  # After canary completes, aggregate:
  fiz-bench matrix-aggregate \
    --in benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21/canary \
    --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21/canary/matrix.json

### Phase 2 — local-qwen

  ./scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh \
    --phase local-qwen \
    --tasks-dir /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench \
    --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21 \
    --resume

### Phase 3 — sonnet-comparison

  ./scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh \
    --phase sonnet-comparison \
    --tasks-dir /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench \
    --per-run-budget-usd 5.0 \
    --matrix-jobs-managed 5 \
    --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21 \
    --resume

### Phase 4 — gpt-comparison

  ./scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh \
    --phase gpt-comparison \
    --tasks-dir /tmp/fizeau-harbor-tb21/terminal-bench \
    --per-run-budget-usd 5.0 \
    --matrix-jobs-managed 5 \
    --out benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21 \
    --resume

### Post-sweep: commit evidence

After all four phases complete, the memo and matrix artifacts should be committed:

  docs/research/terminalbench-2-1-sweep-results-<date>.md  (per AC9)
  benchmark-results/sweep-20260507-tb21/ (matrix.json, costs.json per phase)

The commit message should follow the format:
  bench: commit TB-2.1 full sweep results [fizeau-c770193a]

## What a follow-up bead / manual operator needs to do

1. Restore grendel:8000 OR amend AC4 to reflect grendel exclusion.
2. Update task-subset-tb21-canary.yaml and task-subset-tb21-full.yaml with the
   real task IDs listed above.
3. Run the four phases in sequence in a dedicated benchmark window.
4. Aggregate each phase with fiz-bench matrix-aggregate.
5. Write docs/research/terminalbench-2-1-sweep-results-YYYYMMDD.md with
   commands, environment, dataset commit, phase/lane definitions, resource group
   concurrency settings, pass/fail/invalid counts, costs, and artifact paths.
6. Commit and close the bead.
